Transfer credit policies

Direct Transfer Agreement (DTA)

The DTA applies to transfer-credit applicability; the DTA is not an admission agreement.

Students with a qualifying DTA are assigned junior standing upon admission.

Transfer credit limits

Credit sourceMaximum quarter creditsDegree applicability
Lower-division coursework90Applied toward a UW degree with departmental exceptions.
Total transfer coursework135Applied toward the 180-credit degree total.

Limit applies toward the degree total.

Quarter vs. semester credits

To convert semester to quarter credits, multiply by 1.5.

Courses receiving no credit

  • Courses considered below college level receive no credit.
  • Repeated courses with duplicate subject content receive no credit.

Equivalency lookup

No mapping was found for SAMPLE 101.
